title: SQL: CHECK CONSTRAINT...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER CHECK (id IS NOT NULL), name TEXT CHECK (length(name) <= 50));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, value REAL CHECK (value > 0));
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t2 WHERE value < 20);
key_bug_features: CHECK constraint with function call in table definition
